title: 1st Birthday Decorations for Boys,1st Wild One Birthday Balloons,Jungle Balloons,First Safari 1 Year
features: Wild One:In the pack you will get a total of 94pcs balloons(32inch number one foil balloons,giraffe foil balloons,elephant balloons,20pcs blue balloons,20pcs sand white balloons,20pcs beige balloons,20pcs sage green balloons,10pcs giraffe latex balloons),1 roll blue ribbon,2 sheets glue dots and 3m balloon holder strips.
First Birthday:The package also include the large 32inch number one foil balloons as the main centre piece to highlight your child’s special and first birthday.
Easy to Use:The package also include ribbons,adhesive glue dots and balloon holder strips to make it easy for you to pin them up on the wall,board or an arch.
Filled with Air:All the balloons include the animal foil balloons can be filled with both and helium.Of course,if you don’t use helium,the balloons will not float.
High Quality:This set is absolutely perfect for a child’s first birthday party,and will create a great decorative effect on the day,with lots of colours,designs and shapes for all to enjoy.
